mapper.sql: id, parent_id, session_id, model_id, type, json, create_time
mapper.insert: insert into t_session_message (id, parent_id, session_id, model_id, type, json, create_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sessionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{json,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT})

insert into t_session_message
id,
parent_id,
session_id,
model_id,
type,
json,
create_time,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{parentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sessionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{modelId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{json,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
mapper.update:
update t_session_message
parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
session_id = #{sessionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_id = #{modelId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
json = #{json,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update t_session_message set parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, session_id = #{sessionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_id = #{modelId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, json = #{json,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_session_message (id, parent_id, session_id, model_id, type, json, create_time) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.parentId}, #{item.sessionId}, #{item.modelId}, #{item.type}, #{item.json}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.select:
select
from t_session_message where session_id = #{sessionId} order by create_time

select
from t_session_message where session_id = #{sessionId} and type = 'user' and create_time > (select create_time from t_session_message where id = #{userMessageId} and session_id = #{sessionId} and type = 'user') order by create_time limit 1
